lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The car is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. It is mechanically sound and has been consistently maintained.

Get ready to own a truly exceptional vehicle! This car is in absolutely mint condition, looking and driving just like it did the day it left the showroom. It has been meticulously cared for and is virtually flawless inside and out. If you're looking for a vehicle in pristine, showroom-quality condition, this is the one!

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections but no significant damage. The interior is clean with slight wear from normal use. The engine runs well and the vehicle has been regularly maintained.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish, and there are absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips to be found anywhere on the body. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state, with the leather upholstery and all interior surfaces showing zero signs of wear or aging. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been meticulously maintained with a complete and documented service history. Every feature and electronic component functions exactly as intended. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle that has been kept in climate-controlled storage and treated with the utmost care.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional, reliable driver, though it does show clear signs of age and use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger-side door, and the clear coat is beginning to thin on the roof. Inside, the cabin is clean but the upholstery shows significant wear on the driver’s bolster and there are some permanent stains on the rear floor mats. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, but the suspension feels somewhat loose over bumps and the service light indicates that a brake pad replacement will be needed soon. It is a solid choice for someone looking for affordable transportation who doesn't mind a few cosmetic and minor mechanical imperfections.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and sustained mechanical integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it adheres to our high standards for reliability and aesthetic presentation. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this automobile represents an exceptional acquisition for the professional driver who prioritizes both value and refinement.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been an absolute joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. Everything runs smoothly, and it looks great both inside and out! I'm looking for a quick, fair sale, so come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!
Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Maintained regularly. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is a remarkable example of pride in ownership, offering a balanced blend of performance and everyday utility. The exterior finish maintains a deep, reflective gloss, showing only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use that confirm its history as a well-loved driver. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and inviting; the upholstery is supple and well-preserved, and every button, dial, and digital display functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, a testament to a consistent maintenance schedule. The transmission shifts with precision, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. Recent service records are available, showing that all fluids and filters have been kept current. This is an honest, reliable car that drives as beautifully as it looks, perfect for someone who appreciates a high-standard vehicle that is ready to hit the road immediately without compromise.

Presented for your consideration is this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of performance and enduring value. Subjected to a comprehensive mechanical evaluation, the automobile demonstrates consistent reliability and maintains its aesthetic integrity. This offering represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber vehicle that has been preserved with diligent care.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience and proven mechanical integrity. Every aspect of this automobile has been inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and aesthetics. Secure a sophisticated asset that balances exceptional value with enduring quality.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It runs beautifully and has been super reliable for all my trips! It’s in really solid shape with just the usual character you’d expect from a car that’s been enjoyed, but it still looks great and drives even better. I’ve made sure to keep up with everything so it’s ready for its next adventure with you. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six power unit. This engine maintains excellent compression across all cylinders, with the dual-VANOS system recently serviced to ensure precise variable valve timing. The chassis integrity is secured via reinforced rear subframe mounting points, addressing a known platform weakness. Power is transmitted through a crisp Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. The suspension utilizes
Used vehicle in good condition. Clean title. Regularly maintained. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for immediate sale.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a beautiful shine, with only minor cosmetic wear consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is remarkably clean, featuring fully functional electronics, crisp upholstery, and cold A/C. Mechanically, the car is in strong shape, providing a smooth ride, responsive handling, and a clean service history. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is road-ready and dependable for its next owner.

This refined vehicle offers a distinguished driving experience, blending robust performance with a sophisticated aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. Prospective buyers will appreciate the seamless integration of luxury and reliability present in this well-preserved example.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and driver satisfaction, representing a premier selection for the discerning buyer who prioritizes both quality and value. Our rigorous inspection confirms its status as a reliable, high-caliber addition to any collection.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my weekend trips. It’s got a few minor signs of love here and there, but it runs like a dream and is totally ready for its next adventure. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love it just as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine equipped with six individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is channeled through a precise Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. To ensure long-term structural integrity, the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced, and the VANOS system has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance. The chassis remains taut, utilizing a MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension setup that delivers exceptional lateral grip. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with active use, the mechanical vitals are robust, featuring consistent compression across all cylinders and a responsive throttle map. This is a visceral, analog performance machine optimized for technical driving.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. Runs well.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained 2017 luxury SUV that perfectly balances performance and daily practicality. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that retains a high-gloss luster, though a close inspection will reveal minor, typical road wear such as small stone chips on the leading edge of the hood. Inside, the cabin is a testament to quality craftsmanship; the genuine leather upholstery is supple and clean, showing only light softening on the driver’s seat bolster. All high-tech features, including the panoramic sunroof, premium audio system, and navigation, are fully functional. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with recent fluid services and a fresh set of performance tires. It drives straight, brakes confidently, and the turbocharged engine delivers smooth, responsive power. This is an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a premium experience and mechanical reliability without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an outstanding balance of performance and value. It exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a refined interior, ensuring a superior driving experience. Our rigorous inspection confirms its status as a premier selection for the discerning buyer seeking both quality and longevity.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive inspection, it demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presence. Ideal for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated automotive solution, this model offers a reliable and commanding driving experience.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend getaways. You'll love how smooth it drives! It's been well-loved and well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the road with a new owner today. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 inline-six engine, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This example utilizes the Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission, delivering torque through a variable M-differential lock. The chassis has been maintained with mechanical longevity in mind, including a reinforced rear subframe and updated VANOS seals to ensure optimal variable valve timing performance. The suspension benefits from refreshed bushings and OEM dampers, preserving the original kinematics and steering feedback. While the aesthetic reflects its tenure on the road, the powertrain remains robust with consistent compression across all cylinders and a crisp throttle response characteristic of this naturally aspirated masterpiece.
Used car for sale. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday practicality. The exterior retains its factory luster, showing only minor stone chips and very light surface wear consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather seating is supple with only slight creasing on the driver’s bolster, and all electronic features—including the panoramic sunroof, high-fidelity sound system, and navigation—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, backed by a comprehensive service history documenting regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. With significant tread remaining on the tires and responsive brakes, this car is ready for the road with no immediate service needs. It is a reliable, stylish choice for a discerning buyer seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This meticulously maintained unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. With its sophisticated profile and well-preserved interior, this motorcar offers an exceptional balance of luxury and value for the discerning driver. A premier acquisition for those who demand excellence in their daily commute.
